
 
 
## *************particleSwarm-volume multiple10-mean: resultFilemultiple10*************** ##

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'swarm_size': 400, 'c1': 1.5, 'c2': 2, 'w': 0.1, 'k': 80, 'p': 2, 'niter': 1000, 'ftol': 0.001, 'ftol_iter': 20}
Energy = 0.04668181188942521

#Finished in 1199.6 minutes
 
 
## *************adam-volume multiple10-mean: resultFilemultiple10*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'learning_rate': 1, 'max_steps': 10000, 'ftol': 0.0001, 'tolerance_steps': 200}
Energy = 0.030233097732742586
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])

#Finished in 173.58 minutes
